app.title: Data Team Townhall 2026
app.subtitle: Vibe check the room 🎯
app.privacy_message: This poll is completely anonymous. No personal information is collected or stored anywhere. Your responses cannot be traced back to you in any way.
app.privacy_sub: This is purely for fun — to spark great conversations and good vibes in the room! 🎉
app.thank_you_message: Your answers are in! Sit back, relax, and watch the big screen. Let's see what the data team really thinks!
app.thank_you_sub: Results will be revealed live by your host. Stay tuned! 🍿
app.completed_on_refresh_message: You've answered all questions. Watch the big screen for the live reveal!
app.footer_note: Anonymous • No data stored • Just for fun

dashboard.title: Host Dashboard 🎛️
dashboard.subtitle: Data Team Townhall 2026
dashboard.locked_label: Tap to reveal for the room

questions.question: Why did you actually get into the data field?

quips.a: Different kind of drops. Same crowd energy. Still headlining 🎧
quips.b: Root cause analysis as a personality trait. This is the origin story 🤔
quips.c: The door was open. The data was interesting. That was ten years ago 🗺️
quips.d: Famous last words. Best accidental career decision ever made 😄

options.text: I wanted to be a DJ but ended up mixing datasets instead
I asked too many 'why' questions as a kid and this career found me
Someone gave me database access, said 'explore' — I never found the exit
The job description said 'data' and I said 'sure, how hard can it be'

questions.question: If your team was a Bollywood character, who would it be?

quips.a: Ek dum bindaas! Full energy, zero chill, maximum output 🚀
quips.b: Built different. Loyal to the data, fearless in the fire 🔥
quips.c: Process-first legends. The governance team of the Bollywood universe 📋
quips.d: Romantic, hopeful, absolutely convinced the pipeline will work this time 😄

options.text: Ranbir Singh from Dhuranadar — Young, energetic, Ishq Jalakar aa gaya!
Suniel Shetty from Border — Ye data meri maa hai, koi nahin le sakta!
Amitabh Bachchan from Mohabbatein — Parampara, Pratishtha, Anushasan
Shah Rukh Khan from DDLJ — arms wide open waiting for the data to load

questions.question: What is your TRUE energy in the first meeting of the week?

quips.a: Monday has no power over this energy. The team runs on pure voltage ⚡
quips.b: No rush, no noise. Just quiet confidence and a very strong agenda 👑
quips.c: The one who reframes the meeting in 60 seconds flat. Respect 🙏
quips.d: Functional over theatrical. Results over rituals. Absolutely iconic 😎

options.text: Shaktimaan — pumped, ready, already saved two pipelines before 9am
Baahubali — calm, composed, walks in and owns every second
Rancho from 3 Idiots — curious, asks the smartest question first
Piku — efficient, no-nonsense, let's just get to the point

questions.question: Your honest relationship status with GenAI in 2026?

quips.a: Healthy scepticism. You've seen enough to know. Still here though 😬
quips.b: Daily standups together. No official commitment. Fully functional 😏
quips.c: The optimist and the AI. The power couple of 2026 💘
quips.d: From sceptic to superfan. The glow-up arc. Character development ✨

options.text: It's complicated — brilliant one day, baffling the next
In a situationship — we vibe every day but nobody put a label on it
Deeply in love — completes my sentences and I am here for it
Started rocky, now inseparable — the classic slow-burn story

questions.question: Which superhero best describes your team on deadline day?

quips.a: Scattered across the globe, united by the sprint board. Always 💥
quips.b: No magic. Just obsessive preparation and a very good playbook 🦇
quips.c: Calm under pressure because they planned for this exact scenario 🔮
quips.d: Late but legendary. The landing is always perfect 🕷️

options.text: Avengers — assemble from all time zones and always deliver
Batman — no superpowers, just prep, data, and sheer will
Doctor Strange — already saw 14 million outcomes, picked this one
Spider-Man — swings in at the last moment, sticks the landing

questions.question: If your work style had a cricket legend, which would you be?

quips.a: The legend who never needed to announce themselves. The results did it 🏏
quips.b: The Wall. Built for pressure. Every delivery read. Absolutely unbreakable 🧱
quips.c: Never asks the team what they wouldn't do themselves. Pure fire 🔥
quips.d: Different game, same genius. Global instincts, world-class execution ⚽

options.text: Sachin — calm, consistent, lets the work speak louder than the words
Dravid — technically flawless, never gives up, the team's quiet rock
Kohli — intense, passionate, leads from the front every single time
Honestly? I don't follow cricket — I'm more of a Messi person

questions.question: Who is the REAL villain in every data project?

quips.a: Plot twist after plot twist. Bollywood could learn from our PRDs 🎬
quips.b: One more column. One more filter. One more fiscal year. One more... 😤
quips.c: It works. Nobody knows why. Nobody is touching it. This is law 👻
quips.d: We don't name names. But the git blame does. Always 👀

options.text: Requirements that changed AFTER 3 months of building
The stakeholder who says 'just one more column'
The legacy system nobody dares to touch
Whoever wrote that 3,000-line function with zero comments

questions.question: What is the universal truth of every global team video call?

quips.a: Half the team is doing a virtual tour of someone's bookshelf right now 🎨
quips.b: The most spoken phrase in 47 languages across all time zones 🎤
quips.c: The real meeting is in the thread. Always has been 💬
quips.d: Pixelated legend. Still delivering more value than most full-HD attendees 📡

options.text: Someone's background is more interesting than the actual agenda
'You're on mute!' has officially replaced hello as the global greeting
The best ideas always show up in the chat while someone else is talking
Every call has that one person whose connection is a modern art piece

questions.question: If your data had a personality, it would be?

quips.a: Honest. Unfiltered. Occasionally uncomfortable. Completely necessary 🪞
quips.b: Doesn't reveal everything at once. The deeper you look, the richer it gets 🔍
quips.c: Asked for a number. Got an insight. Got a strategy. Got a career moment 📈
quips.d: Just when you think you know it, the data does something completely unexpected 😂

options.text: That friend who tells you the truth even when you really didn't ask
The mysterious one — brilliant, but takes real effort to understand
The overachiever — always delivers more than you asked for
The comedian — surprises you with patterns nobody expected to find

questions.question: Your data team is the Avengers. Which one are you?

quips.a: The moral compass. The process guardian. Eternally reliable 🛡️
quips.b: The force multiplier. Ships the tool. The team ships the rest 🔧
quips.c: Not lucky. Not guessing. Just already ran the numbers on all of them 🔮
quips.d: Not the villain of the story. Just the one willing to make the hard calls for long-term balance 💜

options.text: Captain America — doing it the right way, every single time, no shortcuts
Iron Man — builds the platform that makes every teammate 10x more powerful
Doctor Strange — looked at 14 million outcomes and picked this exact one
Thanos — people misunderstand me. I just want balance, efficiency, and sustainable outcomes
